name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans York, South Carolina — TitleMax provides same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using vehicle titles as collateral, plus ...
description_long: TitleMax is an established title loan provider with a Memphis location on Summer Avenue that has been operating since February 2007. The company specializes in secured lending products where borrowers use their vehicle title as collateral to access fast cash, making it accessible to customers with various credit profiles. In addition to traditional title pledges, TitleMax offers flex lines of credit (both secured and unsecured) and personal loans, positioning itself as a multi-product emergency lending platform. The Memphis TN 9 - Summer Avenue location is bilingual and maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) to serve the local community. TitleMax distinguishes itself through competitive rates, quick approval processes, and the ability for customers to keep driving their vehicles while using them as loan collateral. The company accepts most credit types and focuses on the value of the vehicle and ability to repay rather than relying solely on credit scores. Customer reviews from the location are uniformly positive (5.00/5 average across 481+ Google reviews), with staff members like Nicole, Joyce, and Jonathan repeatedly praised for professionalism and helpfulness. However, as a title lender, TitleMax operates in a high-risk lending space where borrowers face the threat of vehicle repossession if they default, and the actual APR terms are not disclosed on this location page. The company's expansion into unsecured personal loans suggests they may be attempting to offer lower-risk alternatives, though the focus remains on asset-backed lending.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types—credit score is not the primary factor
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while using title as collateral
Extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays) and bilingual staff at this location
Flex line of credit option allows withdrawals over time up to credit limit
Consistently high customer satisfaction (5.00/5 rating with 481+ reviews)
Multiple product options: title pledges, flex lines of credit, and unsecured personal loans
cons: Risk of vehicle repossession if borrower defaults on title loan
APR and specific rate terms are not disclosed on the website
Title loans are typically high-cost emergency debt products
Unsecured personal loans limited to 10 states (not nationwide availability)
Requires clear vehicle title and valid government ID, limiting accessibility for some borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies with poor or fair credit
Borrowers who need same-day funding and cannot wait for traditional bank approval
Customers who want to borrow against vehicle equity while maintaining access to transportation
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners in immediate financial emergencies who need same-day cash and have limited credit options, but borrowers must understand the risk of vehicle repossession and should carefully compare APR terms before committing to a title loan. This is a short-term emergency product, not a sustainable long-term solution.
services: Title pledges (secured title loans using vehicle as collateral)
Flex line of credit (secured line of credit using vehicle title)
Credit checks (though not primary qualification factor)
Separate customer portals for title loans and personal loans
In-store consultations at 3190 Summer Avenue location
